name: whatsapp
description: Connect your Agents to WhatsApp via WhatsApp Web (Baileys). Pair once with a QR scan; messages go inbound to Agents you bind; replies go outbound through the same socket. Personal-use; not affiliated with WhatsApp.

tools.name: whatsapp_send
tools.description: Send a WhatsApp message to a conversation the connector is paired with.

connector.label: WhatsApp
connector.blurb: Bring your Agents into WhatsApp DMs and groups. Pair via QR; works with your existing WhatsApp number.
connector.tos_acknowledgment: The WhatsApp connector uses the open-source Baileys library to connect to WhatsApp Web on your behalf. You are responsible for using it in a way that complies with WhatsApp's Terms of Service. WhatsApp's ToS forbids unofficial clients for commercial use and prohibits bulk / spam-like behavior; bot accounts that trip Meta's spam detection can be banned. By installing this connector, you accept the Baileys library's MIT license and you take on the responsibility for your own compliance with WhatsApp's Terms of Service. 2200 is not a party to that relationship.
